# EverythingRated

> Multi-axis rating tool for structured directories and catalogs — decisions with explicit trade-offs, not star averages.

## Product

- [Home](https://ratings.highsignal.app/): Directories and ratings

## Machine surfaces

- [Agent catalog](https://ratings.highsignal.app/api/ai): JSON inventory of public surfaces
- [Homepage markdown](https://ratings.highsignal.app/index.md): Product brief without JS
- [This index](https://ratings.highsignal.app/llms.txt)

## Optional

- [Foundry](https://sassmaker.com): Parent fleet showcase

## Product surfaces

- [Trending](https://ratings.highsignal.app/trending)
- [List](https://ratings.highsignal.app/list)
- [Stack](https://ratings.highsignal.app/stack)
- [Aspects](https://ratings.highsignal.app/aspects)
- [API docs](https://ratings.highsignal.app/api-docs)
- [About](https://ratings.highsignal.app/about)
